task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS Lambda function names (1-64 alphanumeric characters and hyphens, must start with letter or number)
